---
title: "AI Chat Index"
format: html
---

## Overview
This page tracks Gemini and Claude conversations used to develop the *Foundations of Image Systems Engineering* book.

## Chapter 1: Light and Optics
- [Link to Chat: Diffraction Limits](https://gemini.google.com/share/...) - Discussed Airy disk derivations.
- [Link to Chat: Lens Aberrations](https://gemini.google.com/share/...) - Explaining Seidel polynomials to students.

## Chapter 2: Sensors and Image Capture
- [Link to Chat: Sony IMX500 Specs](https://gemini.google.com/share/...) - Details on the sensor's AI processing layer.
- [Link to Chat: Shot Noise vs Read Noise](https://gemini.google.com/share/...) - Clarifying the Poisson distribution for photons.

## Technical & Math Queries
- [Link to Chat: Quarto Bibliography Setup](https://gemini.google.com/share/...) - Debugging Paperpile.bib integration.
- [Link to Chat: Matrix Affine Transforms](https://gemini.google.com/share/...) - Logic for the `affinitymath` subdirectory.
